summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

raw_articles.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic

raw_articles.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
raw_articles.summary: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

raw_articles.title: OpenAI launches GPT-Live, a full-duplex voice upgrade that lets ChatGPT talk more like a person
raw_articles.summary: OpenAI on Wednesday launched GPT-Live, a pair of new voice models that fundamentally redesign how people talk to ChatGPT — replacing the company's existing Advanced Voice Mode with an architecture that can listen and speak simultaneously, much like an actual human conversation.The two models, GPT-Live-1 and GPT-Live-1 mini, are rolling out globally starting today across iOS, Android, and ChatGPT.com. GPT-Live-1 becomes the default voice model for paid ChatGPT users on the Go, Plus, and Pro

raw_articles.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
raw_articles.summary: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

raw_articles.title: DeepSeek DSpark: The Speculative Decoding Trick Behind 400% Faster LLM
raw_articles.summary:
DeepSeek’s new DSpark module brings speculative decoding to DeepSeek-V4. It might look like a niche inference tweak, but in production it boosted per-user generation speed by 60 to 85 percent with no drop in model quality. What sets DSpark apart is that it tackles two longstanding problems at once, weak draft quality and the waste […]

raw_articles.title: Inside the Race to Electrify Semi Trailers for Long Haul Freight
raw_articles.summary: A semi-trailer that helps propel itself entered commercial road testing in late May, when a powertrain kit developed by Nivalis Energy Europe, headquartered in Luxembourg with engineering operations in Germany, was fitted to a trailer supplied by Amsterdam-based TIP Group. The self-powered trailer was handed over to German transport operator Sommer for use in its working fleet. raw_articles.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
raw_articles.summary: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes.
